commit.message:
Switch outbound forwarding from Resend SDK to Google Workspace SMTP

Revolut only accepts emails from raphael@installio.co.uk, so we
replace Resend (which sent from a Resend-verified address) with
nodemailer using Google Workspace SMTP (smtp.gmail.com:587).

New env vars required: SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS (Google App Password).
RESEND_API_KEY and FROM_EMAIL are no longer used.

The Resend service itself is still used for inbound email reception
via webhook — only the outbound send path changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix construction milestones misclassified as post-handover

Root cause: Construction milestones use completion % as triggerValue
(e.g., 50 = 50% built), but PaymentPlanStep sorts/classifies all
milestones by triggerValue as months-from-booking. A "50% construction"
(triggerValue=50) > handoverMonths (~29) → misclassified as post-handover.

Fix: Convert construction milestones from % to estimated months in
applyExtractedPlan: triggerValue = round(constructionPct/100 * handoverMonths)

Also adds:
- Outlier detection in edge function (catches 70% among [2.5,2.5,2.5,2.5])
- Post-handover reclassification (small milestones wrongly marked post-HO)
- Client-side outlier detection as safety net

fix: use nightly + build-std to compile stdlib without bulk-memory

v0.53.3 rejects. Using -Z build-std recompiles core/alloc with MVP-only
target features, producing pure MVP WASM.

commit.message:
Add phases 3-9: maps, photos, chat, weather, shopping, offline, dark mode, i18n, tests

- Phase 3: GPS tracking with SQLite buffer, background location, battery-aware accuracy,
  location picker for trip creation, live route polyline and participant markers
- Phase 4: Photo capture/pick with geotag, offline upload queue, gallery and viewer
- Phase 5: Photo sharing in chat with image rendering
- Phase 6: Weather widget (MET Norway API) on trip detail and home, push notification registration
- Phase 7: Shopping list CRUD, trip archive with stats, elevation profile, photo gallery
- Phase 8: Firestore offline persistence, network monitor with sync status bar,
  tracking state persistence (resume after restart), dark mode (theme store + toggle),
  i18n (Norwegian/English), tab bar icons
- Phase 9: Jest + ts-jest setup, 25 unit tests for geoUtils, dateUtils, stores
- Add CLAUDE.md project guide

fix(auth): verify email via GET redirect, remove CSRF from verification

The email link now points to GET /api/auth/verify-email?token=xxx which
verifies the token and redirects to /verify-email?verified=true (or
?error=expired/invalid). This avoids CSRF issues since the one-time
token itself is the proof of ownership. Simplified the verify-email
page to handle redirect params instead of making POST requests.

commit.message:
Fix font rendering: embed Anton as base64 data URI in SVG

fontconfig is unreliable in containerized deployments (Railway/Docker).
The fix: load Anton-Regular.ttf as base64 at module init, inject it as
@font-face in every SVG's <style> block. This makes SVGs self-contained
with zero dependency on system font resolution.

Applied to all 3 compositors:
- sharpCompositor.ts (generic slide overlays)
- coverTemplateCompositor.ts (cover template text zones)
- videoCompositor.ts (video slide overlays)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix math rendering: use single backslashes in \eqn/\deqn

Double backslashes were passing through to HTML literally,
preventing KaTeX from rendering. Single backslashes are correct
for roxygen \eqn{} with markdown = TRUE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: build combined overlays from individual doors, add validation

Replaced all-doors split with individual door compositing for
nf-nr-combined and ff-fr-combined overlays. The all-doors split
couldn't reliably separate near/far when door pixels cross the
center (FR leaked into near half, was missing from far half).

Added validate_overlays() that runs after overlay generation:
- Cross-side contamination (near doors overlapping far doors)
- Combined overlay leakage (wrong-side door pixels)
- Door position sanity (centroid on expected side)
- Non-door overlay overlap checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

nf-nr-combined and ff-fr-combined overlays. The all-doors split
couldn't reliably separate near/far when door pixels cross the
center (FR leaked into near half, was missing from far half).

Added validate_overlays() that runs after overlay generation:
- Cross-side contamination (near doors overlapping far doors)
- Combined overlay leakage (wrong-side door pixels)
- Door position sanity (centroid on expected side)
- Non-door overlay overlap checks

commit.message:
feat: add exploration mode for interactive worktree sessions (#99)

Add a third task mode "exploration" that creates a worktree and launches
Claude Code interactively with no prompt. This lets users freely interact
with CC in an isolated session without triggering any autonomous or
supervised task flow.

Changes:
- Add Exploration variant to TaskMode enum with serialization support
- Handle exploration mode in create_session: launches `claude` with no
  prompt argument (just interactive CC)
- Allow empty description for exploration tasks (defaults to
  "Exploration session" title)
- Auto-launch exploration tasks on creation (like autonomous)
- Mode toggle cycles through 3 modes: autonomous → supervised →
  exploration (right arrow), reverse with left arrow
- Update edit task form to support exploration mode consistently
- feed-next already filters by mode='autonomous' in SQL, so exploration
  tasks are naturally excluded from autonomous chains

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: TUI for orchestrating multiple Claude Code sessions across projects

feat: model-first asset pipeline — async resolver, library, generation

Adds the async model-first pipeline that route.ts already references:
- generateMmlAsync() in generateMml.ts (async entry point)
- lib/assets/assetResolver.ts — async resolver (DB + generation + local)
- lib/assets/assetLibrary.ts — persistent model library with seeded selection
- lib/assets/modelGenerator.ts — text-to-3D via Meshy/Stability/TripoSR
- database/client.ts + schema.ts — model_library table operations
- types/assets.ts + blueprint.ts — ModelLibraryEntry, modelTags, modelCategory

Fixes Vercel build: generateMmlAsync was imported in route.ts but
the source files were never committed.

commit.message:
feat(aviation): multi-step project creation wizard — Phase 1 backend (#60)

* feat(aviation): add document-to-project assignment backend

Add assigned_project FK on StandaloneDocument to track which project a
document belongs to, with SET_NULL so deleting a project returns docs to
the pool. Add source_document FK on PdfDocument for linking PDFs without
file duplication.

- StandaloneDocument: assigned_project FK + serializer fields
- Excel import: guard against assigning to different project, set FK on success
- New POST /api/aviation/documents/{id}/assign-to-project/ endpoint for PDFs
- PdfDocument: source_document FK + effective_file property
- Migrations 0020 + 0021

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(aviation): add multi-step project creation wizard frontend

Implement a 4-step wizard replacing the simple CreateProjectModal:
- Step 1: Basic Info (title, type, deadline)
- Step 2: Select Documents (filtered table with checkbox selection)
- Step 3: Assign Users (optional, multi-select with deadline)
- Step 4: Confirmation preview

Includes useCreateProjectWizard hook with eager project creation at
Step 2→3 transition, cancel/cleanup with keep/delete dialog, and
full i18n support (en + zh).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Fix race condition in PDF assign endpoint (select_for_update inside transaction)
- Remove hardcoded hex fallback colors from SCSS
- Move inline styles to SCSS modules (width: 100%, label styles)
- Remove unnecessary `t` from useMemo dependency array
- Disable Back button after eager project creation

- Delete old CreateProjectModal files
- Add comprehensive tests (163 tests across 6 files)
- Fix code review issues: cancel handler UX, hardcoded colors,
  int coercion on project_id, i18n for import messages

- Add user feedback on project deletion failure (message.warning)

commit.message:
test: add comprehensive edge case tests for ENUM types

- Add 11 new test cases covering edge scenarios:
  - Empty enum values array
  - Single enum value
  - 100 enum values (scalability test)
  - 1000-character value names
  - Duplicate values (should be allowed at storage level)
  - Empty string values
  - Special characters (newlines, tabs, emoji, quotes, null bytes)
  - Corrupted data: truncated count, truncated value length, truncated value data
  - listEnumTypes filtering (excludes tables and views)

- Fix memory safety bug in getEnumType errdefer:
  - Track allocated_count to avoid freeing uninitialized pointers
  - Prevents crash when returning InvalidSchemaData before all values are set

Test count: catalog.zig now has 48 tests (was 37)
All tests passing: 1209 tests (was 1198)

commit.message:
Add metric param to all snapshot formulas + merge AWD inventory

Edge Function v5:
- SP_INVENTORY: merged FBA + AWD data (LEFT JOIN via SKU→ASIN mapping)
  New cols: fulfillable, awd_available, reserved, inbound_working,
  inbound_shipped, awd_inbound, inbound_receiving, total, unsellable
- All snapshot handlers (inventory/fees/health/reimbursements) now
  accept optional metric param — return single column or all columns
- Backwards compatible: omit metric = all columns (same as before)

Apps Script:
- SP_INVENTORY, SP_FEES, SP_HEALTH, SP_REIMBURSE accept optional metric
- Backwards compat: if 3rd param is a number (refresh timestamp), auto-shifts
- Updated SP Config formula reference with single-metric examples
- Fixed row numbers for notes section (shifted by 4 new reference rows)
